channel.title: Plan
channel.generator: Webpage HTML Export plugin for Obsidian

item.title: List of thing to do
item.description: video plan : C++ • The base : language, types, strings, basic values • Loops (while, for) + if/else + break, continue • Functions, scope and recursion • Arrays, vectors and iterators • Mini project : text based calculator • Pointers, references and memory management • Structs and intro to OOP (classes, constructors, destructors) • Inheritance, polymorphism and virtual functions • Making pong with Raylib C • The base : language, types, char arrays, basic values • Loops (while, for) + if/else + break, continue • Functions, scope and recursion • Arrays and pointers • Mini project : text based calculator • Memory management (malloc, calloc, realloc, free) • Structs and function pointers • Enums and unions Java • The base : language, types, strings, basic values • Loops (while, for) + if/else + break, continue • Mini Project Question Game • Functions, scope and recursion • Arrays and ArrayLists • Mini project : text based calculator • OOP : classes, objects, constructors, this keyword • Inheritance, interfaces and abstract classes • Exception handling : instead of your program crashing, you catch the error and decide what to do with it • Collections and generics : data structures like lists and maps that work with any type without rewriting them • File I/O and serialization : reading and writing files, and converting objects into data you can save and reload later • Making pong with Java Swing Python • The base : language, types, strings, basic values • Loops + if/else + break, continue • Functions, scope, recursion and lambda • Lists, dicts, tuples and sets • Mini project : text based calculator • String manipulation and formatting • OOP : classes, methods, inheritance • Modules, packages and pip : splitting your code into multiple files and installing external libraries made by other people • File I/O : reading and writing files • Making pong with Pygame Luau / Roblox • Basic loops, variables and if statement • Functions, scope and recursion • Tables : arrays and dictionaries • String manipulation • OOP in Luau : metatables and modules • Mini project : basic obby with checkpoints • Touched event and basic game interactions • TweenService and animations • Basic UI : ScreenGui, TextButton, TextLabel, Frame • Remote events and bindable events : how the client (player) and the server talk to each other safely • DataStore : saving and loading player data so it persists between sessions • Making a simple complete game Godot • Editor overview : interface, nodes and scenes • GDScript basics : types, variables, loops, functions, if statement • Tilemaps, collision layers and level design • Basic player : movement, collision and tilemaps together • Mini project : simple platformer level • Camera follow, screen limits and parallax background • Animations : AnimationPlayer and AnimatedSprite2D • Basic enemy : movement, patrol and simple AI • Hitbox, hurtbox and damage system • Signals and groups : a way for nodes to communicate without being directly connected to each other • UI : health bar, score, menus and transitions • Particles, sound effects • Saving and loading data • Making a complete small game (platformer or top-down) might do a C# version tooGame to make : Roblox : Anniversary project SMB Remake (maybe)C++ with IDE: Snake Space invaders (possibly) Platformer Test A clone of the first Super Mario Bros level terraria clone version wish (maybe)Godot: A Super Mario small clone in Godot about gamer fighting evil nelson survival horror (maybe)MC clone (i dunno if it would be in c++ or godot so )Unity: A roblox tycoon
